name: z-bridge-engine
description: Z-Bridge engine (.mjs). Hub also exposes these via npm run z:bridge:* from repo root.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('z-bridge engine: no separate build artifact; use hub apps for web bundles.'); process.exit(0);"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('z-bridge: run npm run lint:root from hub root for shared ESLint.'); process.exit(0);"
